completed: Phase 0: repo audit + full read of spec.md; produced analysis, phase plan, risk summary

Phase 1: .gitignore, .env.example, README skeleton
Phase 1: backend Dockerfile + requirements.txt + start_backend.sh entrypoint
Phase 1: frontend Dockerfile (Next.js standalone)

Phase 1: nginx reverse-proxy config
Phase 1: run scripts (dev.sh, down.sh) + gen_password_hash.py helper

Package 1: backend service modules for content, RAG, and reindex pipeline created
Package 1: chatbot endpoint wired to full RAG decision flow (scope filter -> similarity gate -> retrieval -> rerank -> context -> generation -> citation formatting -> fallbacks)

Package 1: replaced keyword-based context_relevance_filter with LLM-based classify_scope() and a real cosine-similarity relevance gate (passes_similarity_gate()) per spec threshold rag_similarity_threshold
Package 1: added owner-name-aware system prompt and spec-locked fallback copy for 'unrelated' and 'no_answer' statuses; unexpected errors degrade to 'error' status instead of a 500
Package 1: added backend/tests/test_chatbot_rag.py covering scope classification (yes/no/provider-error fail-open) and the similarity gate math

Package 1: added missing admin list endpoints (GET) for experiences, education, courses, certificates, projects, social-links, ai-knowledge in admin_service.py and admin.py, following the existing list_skills convention (all per-language translations returned, no lang filtering, admin-auth required)
Package 1: added backend/tests/test_admin_list_endpoints.py verifying route wiring (GET registered, correct path) and that all 7 new list endpoints enforce require_admin (401 without a token)

Package 2: fixed Course model vs Alembic migration schema mismatch (courses table now defines provider/completion_date/credential_url/display_order, matching the Course ORM model, CoursePayload schema, and admin_service.py -- previously had provider(not-null)/title/url/order/created_at, which would have broken reindex.py's course source-gathering query against a live DB). Fix applied only because it blocks the RAG reindex pipeline, per current priority rules.

Package 2: implemented Query Planner + Query Rewrite stage (plan_query() in rag.py), the pipeline stage locked between the Professional Scope Filter and Hybrid Retrieval in NEXT_AGENT.md. LLM-rewrites the raw question into a retrieval-optimized query (resolves pronouns/abbreviations, drops filler); rewritten query is used only for embed_query/retrieve_chunks/rerank_sources, original question is preserved for the final generation step. Fails open (rewritten == original) on provider error.
Package 2: wired plan_query into build_question_answer() between the scope filter and embedding/retrieval steps
Package 2: added 4 unit tests for plan_query (rewritten-query happy path, first-line-only parsing, empty-reply fallback, provider-error fail-open) to test_chatbot_rag.py
in_progress: Agentic RAG pipeline: Hybrid Retrieval (BM25 alongside existing pgvector), RRF fusion, explicit stop conditions, and clarification flow not yet implemented
Backend tests for admin auth and admin CRUD (create/update/delete) service logic
remaining_components: Resolve AdminUser table vs env-based admin auth inconsistency (does not block RAG; deferred)
Implement BM25 lexical retrieval alongside existing pgvector retrieval
Implement Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) to merge pgvector + BM25 result sets
Re-validate/extend the existing reranker once hybrid retrieval + RRF land (currently reranks pgvector-only results)
Add explicit stop conditions to the RAG pipeline (e.g. max retrieval rounds / early exit once confidence is high)
Implement a clarification flow (ask the user a follow-up question when the query is too ambiguous to plan/retrieve against)
Strengthen citation validation so it checks the generated answer against retrieved sources, not just formats source refs
Add backend tests for admin auth and create/update/delete service logic
Integration-test chatbot + admin CRUD flows against a live Postgres+pgvector instance (current tests only cover provider-independent logic and route wiring)
Frontend application implementation (blocked until backend complete per current directive)
known_blockers: No live Postgres+pgvector or DeepSeek API credentials available in this environment. Chatbot RAG logic (including the new Query Planner/Rewrite stage) and the admin list functions were validated via unit tests, route-wiring tests, and an app-boot smoke test only -- not a live end-to-end query against real data. The Course migration fix has not been run against a real Postgres instance either (no `alembic upgrade head` executed here).
next_implementation_task: Implement Hybrid Retrieval: add a BM25 lexical retrieval path alongside the existing pgvector retrieval in rag.py/reindex.py, then Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) to merge the two result sets, per the locked pipeline in NEXT_AGENT.md. Do not change the scope filter, query planner, reranker, context builder, or chatbot wiring contracts.
